name: Tendekayi Gomo
message:
Hi, I came across the QA Automation Engineer opportunity and wanted to reach out directly. I currently work as a QA Engineer with hands-on experience in automation testing, API testing, and working within Agile teams.

I’m now looking for a new challenge in a more automation-focused QA environment where I can continue growing my skills with modern frameworks and tools like Playwright/Selenium and TypeScript.

I believe my background in both manual and automation testing, combined with my eagerness to develop further as a QA Automation Engineer, would make me a strong fit for the role.

I’ve attached my CV and would be happy to discuss the opportunity further.
